# Sample Article — Round-Trip Happy Path

This article exercises every block type the adapter handles.

## Section One

A paragraph with **bold phrase** and *italic phrase* combined in one line.

| Format | Extension |
|:-------|----------:|
| DOCX   | .docx     |
| PDF    | .pdf      |

## Section Two

Some prose introducing a code block.

```python
def hello() -> str:
    return "world"
```

> Note: this blockquote becomes an info callout in the spec.
